name: Cucumber Soup with Lemongrass and Spinach
recipeIngredient: 2 celery ribs, strings removed and chopped with a vegetable peeler
2 stalks fresh lemongrass, tender part only, minced
2 medium cucumbers, peeled and seeded, chopped
recipeInstructions:
Preparation time: 15 minutes. Cooking time: 25 minutes. Yield: 5 cups.
1. Melt butter in a large saucepan over medium heat. Add celery, onion, and lemongrass. Cook gently until the onion is tender, about 15 minutes.
2. Add cucumbers and stock. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat, cover, and simmer until cucumber is tender, approximately 10 minutes.
3. Strain solids from liquid into a bowl; set aside. Puree spinach and cilantro in a blender or food processor with the reserved liquid, cream, salt, and pepper. Mix until smooth.
4. Serve warm or chilled.
